'''Govians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Govia system/Legends|Govia system]]. A [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of this species was a receptionist at one of Dr. [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan's]] "clinics" who was [[stun]]ned unconscious by [[Jodo Kast]] as he pursued the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Evazan's head.<ref name="GG1">{{WEGCite|story=One That Got Away|book=Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope|reprint=1}}</ref>
